verses.text: 'Try the spirits whether they are of God'; every spirit that confesses Christ come in the flesh is of God, and that which denies is antichrist. Test teaching. Confessing the incarnate Christ marks God's Spirit.

'Try the spirits whether they are of God'; every spirit that confesses Christ come in the flesh is of God, and that which denies is antichrist. Test teaching. Confessing the incarnate Christ marks God's Spirit.

'Try the spirits whether they are of God'; every spirit that confesses Christ come in the flesh is of God, and that which denies is antichrist. Test teaching. Confessing the incarnate Christ marks God's Spirit.
'Greater is he that is in you, than he that is in the world'; we are of God, and they that know God hear us. Greater within. God's Spirit overcomes the world's.
'Greater is he that is in you, than he that is in the world'; we are of God, and they that know God hear us. Greater within. God's Spirit overcomes the world's.
'Greater is he that is in you, than he that is in the world'; we are of God, and they that know God hear us. Greater within. God's Spirit overcomes the world's.
'Let us love one another: for love is of God'; 'he that loveth not knoweth not God; for God is love.' God is love. To know God is to love.
'Let us love one another: for love is of God'; 'he that loveth not knoweth not God; for God is love.' God is love. To know God is to love.
God's love was shown sending His Son 'to be the propitiation for our sins'; if He so loved us, 'we ought also to love one another.' Loved to love. His sacrifice teaches us to love.
God's love was shown sending His Son 'to be the propitiation for our sins'; if He so loved us, 'we ought also to love one another.' Loved to love. His sacrifice teaches us to love.
God's love was shown sending His Son 'to be the propitiation for our sins'; if He so loved us, 'we ought also to love one another.' Loved to love. His sacrifice teaches us to love.
No man has seen God; if we love, He dwells in us; we have seen and testify the Father sent the Son. Indwelling. God is seen in His loving people.
No man has seen God; if we love, He dwells in us; we have seen and testify the Father sent the Son. Indwelling. God is seen in His loving people.
No man has seen God; if we love, He dwells in us; we have seen and testify the Father sent the Son. Indwelling. God is seen in His loving people.
Whoever confesses Jesus is the Son, God dwells in him; 'God is love; and he that dwelleth in love dwelleth in God.' Dwelling. To abide in love is to abide in God.
Whoever confesses Jesus is the Son, God dwells in him; 'God is love; and he that dwelleth in love dwelleth in God.' Dwelling. To abide in love is to abide in God.
Love is made perfect, that we have boldness in judgment; 'perfect love casteth out fear.' 'We love him, because he first loved us.' No fear. Perfect love drives out dread of judgment.
Love is made perfect, that we have boldness in judgment; 'perfect love casteth out fear.' 'We love him, because he first loved us.' No fear. Perfect love drives out dread of judgment.
Love is made perfect, that we have boldness in judgment; 'perfect love casteth out fear.' 'We love him, because he first loved us.' No fear. Perfect love drives out dread of judgment.
If a man says he loves God but hates his brother, he is a liar; this commandment we have, to love both. No pretending. Love of God must show in love of man.
